title: ligusticum filicinum var. tenuifolium
intro: Ligusticum filicinum var. tenuifolium, also known as Chinese Lovage or Chinese Angelica, is a type of plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is a perennial herb native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ligusticum filicinum var. tenuifolium include reducing fever, relieving pain and headaches, and supporting respiratory and digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
